title: dendrosenecio erici-rosenii subsp. erici-rosenii
intro: Dendrosenecio erici-rosenii subsp. erici-rosenii, also known as the giant rosenbach's senecio, is a rare and unique plant species found in Kenya's mountainous regions. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which contain senecionine and seneciphylline, compounds that have been used traditionally to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Dendrosenecio erici-rosenii subsp. erici-rosenii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves are prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat conditions like fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
